messages.content:
List potential impacts to an organization if this vulnerability is exploited.

A firmware update vulnerability exists in the fw_check.sh functionality of Wavlink AC3000 M33A8.V5030.210505. A specially crafted HTTP request can lead to arbitrary firmware update. An attacker can perform a man-in-the-middle attack to trigger this vulnerability.

Exploitation of this vulnerability could result in unauthorized control of network devices, data corruption or loss, disruption of services (DoS), and potential data breaches. This can negatively affect organizational operations, result in financial losses, and damage reputation.
